---
title: "Schedule"
pagetitle: "Schedule — EM 619 MLPA"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Course Materials

* [GitHub repo with lecture source, slides & notebooks](https://github.com/nipunbatra/ml-teaching)
* [All PDF lecture slides](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/slides.html)
* [All rendered lecture notebooks](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks.html)

Slides and notebooks below link to the shared `ml-teaching` materials. Session recordings (Zoom) are posted on the course channel.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
This plan reproduces the **previous offering (Jan–Apr 2025)**. Dates and ordering are **tentative** for the upcoming term. Sessions are online: **Thu 8:15–9:45 PM**, **Sat 11:00 AM–12:30 PM**, **Sun 10:00–11:30 AM**.
:::

| # | Date | Topic (Slides) | Notebooks & Resources | By |
|:--:|:----:|:------|:------|:--:|
| | | **Module 1 · Foundations** | | |
| 1 | 16 Jan | [Introduction & Logistics](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/basics/slides/1-introduction-ml-2025.pdf) | — | Nipun |
| 2 | 18 Jan | [Conventions & Metrics](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/basics/slides/accuracy-convention.pdf) | [Rule-based vs ML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/rule-based-vs-ml.html), [Confusion Matrix](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/confusion-mnist.html), [Dummy baselines](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/dummy-baselines.html) | Nipun |
| | | **Module 2 · Trees & Ensembles** | | |
| 3 | 25 Jan | [Decision Trees](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/decision-trees.pdf) | [Entropy](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/entropy.html), [DT (real output)](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/decision-tree-real-output.html) | Ashish |
| 4 | 26 Jan | [Random Forests](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/ensemble.pdf) | [Feature importance](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/ensemble-feature-importance.html) | Ashish |
| 5 | 1 Feb | [Random Forests & Ensemble Learning](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/ensemble.pdf) | [Feature importance](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/ensemble-feature-importance.html), [Meshgrid](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/meshgrid.html) | Ashish |
| 6 | 2 Feb | [Entropy, Information Gain, Hyperparameter Tuning](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/cross-validation.pdf) | [Entropy](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/entropy.html), [Hyperparameter tuning](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/hyperparams-experiments.html) | Ashish |
| | | **Module 3 · Regression & Optimization** | | |
| 7 | 8 Feb | [Linear Regression](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/linear-regression.pdf) | — | Nipun |
| 8 | 9 Feb | [Linear Regression — Basis & Normal Equation](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/linear-regression.pdf) | [Basis expansion](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/basis.html) | Nipun |
| 9 | 13 Feb | [Geometric Interpretation, Dummy Variables, Multicollinearity](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/linear-regression.pdf) | [Geometric LR](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/geometric-linear-regression.html), [Dummy vars & multicollinearity](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/dummy-variables-multi-colinearity.html) | Nipun |
| 10 | 15 Feb | [Gradient Descent, Optimization, Taylor Series](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/optimization/slides/gradient-descent.pdf) | [Taylor series](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/taylor.html), [Contours & GD](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/contour.html) | Nipun |
| | | **Module 4 · Classification** | | |
| 11 | 20 Feb | [Stochastic & Mini-Batch Gradient Descent](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/optimization/slides/gradient-descent.pdf) | [Gradient descent](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/gd.html) | Ashish |
| 12 | 22 Feb | [Logistic Regression, Ridge, Sparse Solutions](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/logistic-1.pdf) · [Ridge](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/ridge-regression.pdf) · [LASSO](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/lasso-regression.pdf) | [Why logits](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/logits-usage.html), [Logistic in Torch](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/logistic-regression-torch.html) | Ashish |
| 13 | 27 Feb | [Logistic Regression + Neural Networks](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/logistic-1.pdf) | [Logistic in Torch](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/logistic-regression-torch.html) | Ashish |
| 14 | 1 Mar | [Logistic Regression + Neural Networks](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/logistic-1.pdf) | — | Ashish |
| 15 | 6 Mar | [Logistic Regression, Learning Parameters, Sigmoid](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/supervised/slides/logistic-1.pdf) | [Why logits](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/logits-usage.html) | Nipun |
| | | **Module 5 · Neural Networks** | | |
| 16 | 8 Mar | [Introduction to Neural Networks (MLP)](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/neural-networks/slides/mlp.pdf) | — | Nipun |
| 17 | 22 Mar | [Neural Networks (contd.)](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/neural-networks/slides/mlp.pdf) | — | Ashish |
| 18 | 23 Mar | [Neural Networks (contd.)](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/neural-networks/slides/mlp.pdf) | — | Ashish |
| 19–20 | 30 Mar | [Neural Networks + Autograd](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/neural-networks/slides/autograd.pdf) | [Autodiff](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/autodiff.html) | Ashish |
| 21 | 5 Apr | Implementing Neural Networks with Keras 3.0 | [Keras 3.0](https://keras.io/) | Ashish |
| 22 | 6 Apr | Implementing Neural Networks with Keras 3.0 | [Keras 3.0](https://keras.io/) | Ashish |
| | | **Module 6 · CNNs & Transformers** | | |
| 23 | 12 Apr | [Vanishing Gradients & CNNs](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/neural-networks/slides/CNN.pdf) · [1D CNN](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/neural-networks/slides/1d-cnn.pdf) | [1D CNN](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/1d-cnn.html), [Edge detection](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/cnn-edge.html), [LeNet](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/cnn.html) | Ashish |
| 24 | 13 Apr | [Convolutional Neural Networks](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/neural-networks/slides/CNN.pdf) | [LeNet](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/cnn.html) | Ashish |
| 25 | 19 Apr | Transformers | [Next-token prediction](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/neural-networks/slides/next-token.pdf) | Ashish |
| 26 | 20 Apr | Transformers (contd.) | [Names notebook](https://nipunbatra.github.io/ml-teaching/notebooks/names.html) | Ashish |
| 27–28 | 22 Apr | Transformers — Applications | — | Nipun |
| | | **Module 7 · Advanced Topics & Wrap-up** | | |
| 29 | 24 Apr | AI, Ethics, Bias & Fairness | — | Nipun |
| 30 | 26 Apr | Transfer Learning | — | Ashish |
